title: dichilus microphyllus
intro: Dichilus microphyllus, also known as the small-leaved dichilus, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Dichilus microphyllus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
